equations.name: Einstein field equation baseline
equations.expression: G_mu_nu + Lambda * g_mu_nu = (8 * pi * G / c^4) * T_mu_nu

equations.name: Semiclassical Einstein coupling
equations.expression: G_mu_nu + Lambda * g_mu_nu = (8 * pi * G / c^4) * <T_mu_nu>

equations.name: First-order uncertainty propagation
equations.expression: sigma_f^2 = sum_i ((partial f / partial x_i)^2 * sigma_x_i^2)

equations.name: Runtime safety gate
equations.expression: abs(delta_T00 / max(abs(T00_ref), eps)) <= rho_delta_max AND qi_bound_ok = true

symbols.quantity: apparent angular separation between figure centers
apparent angular radius of the occulting body
apparent angular radius of the occulted or transiting body
distance from Earth's center to the evaluation point
distance from Earth's center to the external body
zenith angle of the external body at the evaluation point

equations.name: Angular momentum and external torque balance

symbols.quantity: normalized polar moment of inertia factor

equations.name: Planck spectral radiance
equations.expression: B_lambda(T) = (2 * h * c^2 / lambda^5) * 1 / (exp((h * c) / (lambda * k_B * T)) - 1)

symbols.quantity: spectral radiance at wavelength lambda and temperature T

equations.name: Effective temperature from luminosity and radius

symbols.quantity: effective temperature inferred from luminosity and radius

equations.name: Augmented stellar source function
equations.expression: I_lambda_model = T_lambda[(epsilon_lambda_base * B_lambda(T)) + J_lambda_mech + J_lambda_coh + J_lambda_other]

equations.name: Mechanoluminescent source term
equations.expression: J_lambda_mech = A_ml * f(sigma, sigma_dot, n_trap, xi) * psi_lambda

equations.name: Lattice emissivity modifier
equations.expression: epsilon_lambda = epsilon_lambda_0(T, rho, X_i) * (1 + alpha_xi * K_xi(lambda))

symbols.quantity: baseline emissivity from temperature, density, and composition

equations.name: Coherence angular modifier
equations.expression: I_lambda(theta, phi) = epsilon_lambda * B_lambda(T) * (1 + C_lambda(theta, phi))

equations.name: Stellar spectral viability contract
equations.expression: V_star = score[continuum_rms, uv_residual, line_residual, bolometric_closure, anisotropy_penalty, parameter_penalty]

symbols.quantity: continuum relative RMS residual against the null model family
bolometric closure residual against luminosity-radius constraints
explicit complexity penalty for non-null source lanes
thermally averaged reaction cross section times velocity
mode frequency for radial order n and degree l

equations.name: Solar dynamo cycle
equations.expression: partial_t B = curl(v x B) + eta * nabla^2 B

symbols.quantity: flare-event count density at energy E
timing offset between flare and sunquake

equations.name: Quasi-periodic flare envelope
equations.expression: A_env(t) = A0 * (1 + epsilon * cos(2 * pi * t / P_qpp))

equations.name: Stellar observables correlation diagnostic
equations.expression: D_star = diagnose[corr(A_cycle, delta_nu), slope(A_cycle -> delta_nu), alpha_flare]

equations.name: Curvature-unit proxy contract
equations.expression: kappa_proxy = map_units(curvature_signal, scale_assumptions) ; residual = abs(kappa_proxy - kappa_ref)/max(abs(kappa_ref), eps)

equations.name: Effective interaction Hamiltonian with external potential

symbols.quantity: stress response tensor or effective constitutive response
